name: Sentry Auto-Triage
description: Full-intelligence Sentry triage agent. Detects regressions, classifies severity (P0-P3), deduplicates tickets, and posts rich incident summaries.

tools.name: triage_issue
tools.description: ALL-IN-ONE: Parses stack trace, classifies priority (P0-P3), and detects regression from a Sentry issue+event JSON.

tools.name: blame_code_line
tools.description: Uses GitHub GraphQL git blame to find the EXACT author, commit, and message for a specific line in a file.

tools.name: create_ticket_and_notify
tools.description: ALL-IN-ONE: Generates formatted Linear ticket markdown AND Slack message from triage data.

tools.name: deduplicate_check
tools.description: Checks if this Sentry issue was already triaged in the last hour. Returns already_triaged: true to skip.

tools.name: record_triage
tools.description: Records a completed triage to prevent duplicate tickets for 1 hour.
